metadata.description: Control Apple Music, AirPlay speakers, and AirPods from Claude Code or the terminal. Instant slash commands, a full CLI, and natural language orchestration — all on macOS.

plugins.name: music
plugins.description: Control Apple Music, AirPlay speakers, and AirPods from Claude Code or the terminal. Slash commands for instant playback and speaker control (zero tokens), a CLI for search, playlists, and discovery, and natural language for multi-step orchestration. Works on macOS with zero setup.
